From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Genus of moths

| *Hollandia* | |
| --- | --- |
| [Scientific classification](/wiki/Taxonomy_(biology) "Taxonomy (biology)") [Edit this classification](/wiki/Template:Taxonomy/Hollandia "Edit this classification") | |
| Kingdom: | [Animalia](/wiki/Animal "Animal") |
| Phylum: | [Arthropoda](/wiki/Arthropod "Arthropod") |
| Class: | [Insecta](/wiki/Insect "Insect") |
| Order: | [Lepidoptera](/wiki/Lepidoptera "Lepidoptera") |
| Superfamily: | [Noctuoidea](/wiki/Noctuoidea "Noctuoidea") |
| Family: | [Erebidae](/wiki/Erebidae "Erebidae") |
| Subfamily: | [Calpinae](/wiki/Calpinae "Calpinae") |
| Genus: | *Hollandia* [Butler](/wiki/Arthur_Gardiner_Butler "Arthur Gardiner Butler"), 1892 |

***Hollandia***  is a [genus](/wiki/Genus "Genus") of [moths](/wiki/Moth "Moth") of the family [Erebidae](/wiki/Erebidae "Erebidae"). The genus was erected by [Arthur Gardiner Butler](/wiki/Arthur_Gardiner_Butler "Arthur Gardiner Butler") in 1892.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Species

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Hollandia_(moth)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Species")]

* *[Hollandia sigillata](/w/index.php?title=Hollandia_sigillata&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hollandia sigillata (page does not exist)")* Butler, 1892 Gabon, Central African Republic
* *[Hollandia spurrelli](/w/index.php?title=Hollandia_spurrelli&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hollandia spurrelli (page does not exist)")* Hampson, 1926 Ghana, Nigeria
